article_title: 30 道 EF Core 2026 面试真题：考官真正关心什么
core_theme: EF Core 面试中的真实考察维度——从表面回答到深层机制理解
reader_takeaway: 知道 EF Core 面试官真正问什么、挂掉什么回答
summary_angle: 表面上问的是概念和语法，实际上考察的是变更追踪、查询翻译、生命周期——知道这个落差才能通过面试

information_blocks.source_anchor: EF Core interview questions are scenario questions, not definition checks — they reveal whether you've actually shipped data access
information_blocks.visual_idea: 表面层的简单问答（被划掉/变淡），暗示这些不够

information_blocks.source_anchor: 7 categories: DbContext lifetime, LINQ translation, loading strategies, N+1, migrations, change tracking, advanced
information_blocks.visual_idea: 深层机制的结构层浮现出来——变更追踪、SQL翻译、生命周期

information_blocks.source_anchor: 5 mistakes that get developers rejected: singleton DbContext, lazy loading in APIs, client vs server evaluation, EnsureCreated in production, forgetting await
information_blocks.visual_idea: 5 个红牌警示从表面层穿透到深层

main_metaphor: 面试冰山——表面是简单问答，水下是深层机制考察
primary_subject: 一个分层透视的场景，上层是模糊的概念卡片（表面问答），下层是精密运转的数据库引擎结构（真正考察的机制）
subject_action: 穿透表面层，视线聚焦到深层机制：变更追踪器、SQL 翻译引擎、生命周期管理
composition: 上下分层（iceberg / layered reveal），上层简洁模糊，下层精密丰富
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: painterly digital illustration, rich brushwork, volumetric lighting, strong focal contrast, textured color masses
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，从 40 项风格池随机选中；面试评价这个主题适合用厚涂的体积感和对比度来表达'表面 vs 深层'的反差
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 第一轮验证：冰山上层淡出+下层精密的分层构图是否成立，主体关系是否清晰
revision_targets: 如果上层概念卡片太抢戏，减弱不透明度和细节
如果下层引擎太复杂，聚焦 3 个核心机制可视化
如果厚涂体积感不够，增加局部光源和笔触纹理
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: EF Core interview evaluation — surface-level answers vs deep mechanism understanding. The reader should quickly feel that real interview success requires understanding the underlying engine, not just definitions.

Summary angle: Interviewers ask about concepts but evaluate deep mechanisms (change tracker, query translation, lifecycle). Knowing this gap is what separates passing from failing.
Narrative flow: layered reveal. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject (an iceberg/layered cross-section showing deep mechanisms) and 2-3 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- problem: surface layer showing faded concept cards that are not enough. Label: '概念定义'.
- mechanism: deep layer revealing the real evaluation target — change tracker, SQL translation engine, lifecycle patterns. Label: '底层机制'. Numeric: '7'.
- takeaway: 5 red-flag items piercing through from surface to depth. Label: '5 个坑'. Numeric: '5'.

Main metaphor: An interview iceberg — the visible surface is faded simple Q&A, beneath the surface is a precise technical engine being evaluated.
Subject: A layered cross-section/iceberg scene. Upper layer shows blurry faded concept cards (surface Q&A). Lower layer reveals a precise, well-lit database engine structure (change tracker, SQL translator, lifecycle manager) — the real evaluation target.
Composition/framing: vertical layer split (iceberg / top-bottom). Upper third simplified and fading, lower two-thirds detailed and richly lit. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: combine conceptual editorial illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: painterly digital illustration, rich brushwork, volumetric lighting, strong focal contrast, textured color masses. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: deep blue-gray for the deep mechanism layer, warm golden light for focal highlights, light gray for faded surface layer, ivory/light background.
Visible text policy: allow only 3 short Chinese labels or number chips: '概念定义', '底层机制', '7', '5 个坑'. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels.
Constraints: no watermark, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics.
Avoid: code rain, generic robots, cyberpunk neon, fake charts, UI screenshots, floating chips, Q&A speech bubbles.
